title: Drywall Repair Kauai
metaTitle: Drywall Repair Kauai | Texture Matching & Painting | Ad Value Home Improvement
metaDescription: Expert drywall repair and texture matching on Kauai. Water damage, hole repairs, popcorn ceilings, and interior/exterior painting. Free estimates.
subtitle: Holes, water stains, texture mismatches — we fix it so you can't tell anything happened.
imageAlt: Interior wall repair and painting preparation in progress
intro: Drywall damage on Kauai often comes from water — whether a roof leak, plumbing issue, or humidity intrusion. Ad Value Home Improvement specializes in the full cycle: fixing the source of moisture, replacing damaged drywall, matching existing textures seamlessly, and finishing with paint that ties everything together. The result? You won't know anything was ever there.

highlights.title: Texture Matching
highlights.description: From smooth walls to skip trowel and knockdown — we match your existing texture so repairs are invisible.

highlights.title: Water Damage Specialists
highlights.description: We address the moisture source first, then restore the wall — so the problem doesn't come back.

highlights.title: Paint Matching
highlights.description: Color-matched paint applied professionally for a seamless, like-new finish.

highlights.title: Any Room, Any Size
highlights.description: From a small patch to full room restoration — we handle it all with the same level of care.

schemaDescription: Professional drywall repair and texture matching on Kauai. Water damage, hole repairs, and interior painting.
